question.label: Sharper feedback
question.name: Sharper feedback earlier — what stops you doing that in the moment?
question.description: Drills into the immediate blocker behind delaying sharper feedback so the cause is explicit.

answer: I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.

assessment.note: He names a specific blocker — insufficient trust with adjacent teams — that is strongly limiting his growth behavior; no clear wellbeing signal.

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
